target:

Ugh… I don't… I don't know!
But I'm… I'm…

Did my brother just seem like food to you?

Did you want to be friends with my brother?

Ugh… why…
Why did this happen!?

Haine was an important friend!
But Ryunosuke was important too…

(When something entered Hizuru's body,

It hurts! It hurts! It hurts!

If you say so,
Then that's probably the case.

I'm sorry, Shinpei!
I didn't notice because it was hiding in Haine's presence!
